title: Pete Heat Bigtime
description: A joyously unhinged hour of stand-up comedy, with smart, surreal and self-aware magic. This is what happens when you take the best bits from Pete's last six Fringe shows, add a couple of new bangers, and bake them in the oven for exactly 60 minutes. Bring a spare brain. Mind-blowing, strange, and at times even poignant, but constantly funny.

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex
